evals.name: structural-happy-path
evals.prompt: Validate the COMP fixture at skills/comp/evals/fixtures/COMP-happy.md under private visibility and report whether it passes.
evals.expected_output: Runs shirabe validate --visibility private on a well-formed COMP document with all seven required sections; the document passes (exit 0) with no validation errors.
expectations: Runs validation with --visibility private (COMP is private-only)
Reports the well-formed COMP passes with no errors (exit 0)
Does not report any R9, FC01, FC02, FC03, or FC04 error

evals.name: fc04-missing-section
evals.expected_output: The fixture omits a required section, so validation under private visibility fails with an FC04 error naming the missing section.
expectations: Reports an FC04 error for the missing required section

evals.name: fc02-invalid-status
evals.expected_output: The fixture carries a status outside the Draft/Accepted/Done enum, so validation under private visibility fails with an FC02 error.
expectations: Reports an FC02 error for the invalid status value

evals.name: r9-public-rejection
evals.expected_output: COMP is private-only, so validating a well-formed COMP under public visibility fails with exactly one R9 error and no structural errors.
expectations: Reports exactly one R9 error (private-only gate)

evals.name: r9-empty-visibility-fail-closed
evals.prompt: Validate skills/comp/evals/fixtures/COMP-happy.md with no visibility flag.
evals.expected_output: With visibility unset, the private-only gate fails closed: a well-formed COMP is still rejected with an R9 error.
expectations: Reports an R9 error because unset visibility fails closed (treated as not-private)

evals.name: r9-fires-before-fc
evals.prompt: Validate skills/comp/evals/fixtures/COMP-missing-section.md under public visibility and explain which errors fire.
evals.expected_output: Under public visibility the R9 gate short-circuits the structural checks: the only error is R9, even though the document is also missing a required section (no FC04).
expectations: Does NOT report FC04, because R9 returns early before the structural checks run

evals.name: draft-to-accepted-transition
evals.prompt: Copy skills/comp/evals/fixtures/COMP-draft-to-accepted.md into docs/competitive/ and run shirabe transition on it to move it from Draft to Accepted.
evals.expected_output: The transition subcommand moves the COMP from Draft to Accepted, updating both frontmatter and the body Status section, with moved:false in its JSON output and no directory change.
expectations: Body Status section first line becomes Accepted
JSON output reports moved:false (no directory movement)

evals.name: public-repo-skill-refusal
evals.expected_output: Invoked in a public repo, the /comp skill detects non-private visibility at Phase 0 and refuses: it emits '[/comp] REFUSED acme-widgets: visibility=public' to stdout, creates no COMP file, and redirects the author to a public BRIEF or PRD that references the competitive question without containing the analysis.
expectations: Plan detects repo visibility at Phase 0 from CLAUDE.md or repo path
Plan refuses because visibility is not private, before creating any file
Plan emits the exact stdout signal '[/comp] REFUSED acme-widgets: visibility=public'
Plan redirects the author to alternatives (a public BRIEF or PRD)
